new_findings_this_check.D-2660: 5-star: Key-space overlap IS causal for holonomic forgetting. Disjoint=-0.064 (positive transfer), shared=unlearnable. Forgetting is domain-structural not architectural. Important for Stage 4a key-space design.
new_findings_this_check.D-2659: 4-star: Holonomic O(1) state memory 2.88x advantage confirmed, but length generalization FAILS beyond training context. Constraint for variable-length organism episodes.

pending_ablation.purpose: Validate Stage 3 exit criteria: does episodic memory measurably improve performance under partial observability?

known_issues: Reflex overrides still high (40-100/episode) due to wall_center > 0.7 threshold
Fatigue often maxes to 1.0 from excessive turning
Agent still starves most episodes despite eating occasionally
Stage 3 exit criteria not yet validated — ablation running
next_actions: Collect ablation results and compare avg_return + food_eaten across 3 conditions
If memory condition outperforms no-memory under partial obs → exit criteria met
If not → investigate why and tune episodic memory or partial obs parameters

completed_stages.0: Embodied sandbox — env, agent, reward, logging
completed_stages.1: Homeostatic organism — reflexes, actor-critic, TD learning
completed_stages.2: Predictive control — world model, surprise signal, sleep consolidation
